form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last preparation winning won by 1.3 len this track October 10 over 1400m defeating Wadooda with 58kg at $1.80. On debut third of 10 at this track September 27 over 1400m, 2 len behind Mubasimah with 58kg at $2.20. Terrific chance to continue the strong form.
